properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2 V6 C2 V7 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I left a barren land searching for rest Stumbling around in amnesia Bitterness and distress But then I met the Kinsman Redeemer Who's called the Mighty One he took this old Moabite From the field and brought me to his house

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: He said, "Fear not my child for you are part of me And I'll not rest till you are at my side I will do all that you ask of Me You're a jewel in My eye Virtuous woman you are My Bride"

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I've responded to your call and you have covered me With eyes of faith I see all the mysteries being revealed Now I see who I am I make claim to all that's mine I am the Lamb's wife I was bought with a price

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: When I look back and see How much grace and love you showed me Lord it brings me to my knees That You can even think about me

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: When I am in need you are still Jehovah Jireh Jehovah Rapha you are still the great healer With faith I'll stand on your word Because you are more than able

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Lord I am casting all my cares on you I know you love me redemption by blood That's the greatest love story Full restoration, full redemption,

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: That's what seven angels in a cloud testified My redeemer's no longer dead, He is risen and he's coming back For you and me
